import * as React from "react"
export const layout = "fullscreen"

const API_BASE = "https://wrnsignal-api.vercel.app"
const JOBFIT_RUN_PATH = "/signal/jobfit"
const JOBFIT_RUN_PROD_ORIGIN = "https://wrnsignal.workforcereadynow.com"

const LOGO_SRC =
    "data:image/png;base64,"

function isFramerHost() {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return false
    const h = window.location.hostname || ""
    return h.endsWith(".framer.app") || h.includes("framer")
}

function goToJobFitRun() {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return
    const url = isFramerHost()
        ? `${JOBFIT_RUN_PROD_ORIGIN}${JOBFIT_RUN_PATH}`
        : `${window.location.origin}${JOBFIT_RUN_PATH}`
    window.location.assign(url)
}

function isFramerPreview(): boolean {
    if (typeof window === "undefined") return false
    const h = window.location.hostname || ""
    return (
        h.includes("framer") ||
        h.includes("framercanvas") ||
        h.includes("genuine-times") ||
        h.includes("localhost") ||
        h.endsWith(".framer.app")
    )
}

function safeTrimLower(v: string) {
    return (v || "").trim().toLowerCase()
}

const TRIAL_UNLOCK_KEY = "jobfit_unlocked"
const TRIAL_EMAIL_KEY = "jobfit_email"

type Stage = "form" | "saving" | "success"

// ─── TOKENS ──────────────────────────────────────────────
const C = {
    bg: "#0A1628",
    card: "#111E35",
    cardDeep: "#0D1829",
    orange: "#FEB06A",
    orangeGlow: "rgba(254,176,106,0.18)",
    blue: "#51ADE5",
    blueGlow: "rgba(81,173,229,0.15)",
    teal: "#218C8C",
    green: "#4ade80",
    greenGlow: "rgba(74,222,128,0.12)",
    red: "#f87171",
    text: "rgba(255,255,255,0.93)",
    muted: "rgba(255,255,255,0.58)",
    dim: "rgba(255,255,255,0.33)",
    border: "rgba(255,255,255,0.11)",
    borderSoft: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
    glass: "rgba(255,255,255,0.055)",
}

// ─── KEYFRAMES ───────────────────────────────────────────
const GLOBAL_STYLES = `
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap');

@keyframes orb1 {
  0%,100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1); }
  50%      { transform: translate(40px,-30px) scale(1.12); }
}
@keyframes orb2 {
  0%,100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1); }
  50%      { transform: translate(-30px,40px) scale(1.08); }
}
@keyframes orb3 {
  0%,100% { transform: translate(0,0) scale(1); }
  33%      { transform: translate(25px,20px) scale(1.15); }
  66%      { transform: translate(-20px,-25px) scale(0.92); }
}
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(22px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes scoreCount {
  from { opacity:0; transform:scale(0.7); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform:scale(1); }
}
@keyframes barFill {
  from { width: 0%; }
  to   { width: 81%; }
}
@keyframes pulse {
  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(254,176,106,0.4); }
  50%      { box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(254,176,106,0); }
}
@keyframes shimmer {
  0%   { background-position: -400px 0; }
  100% { background-position: 400px 0; }
}
@keyframes scanLine {
  0%   { top: 0%; opacity:0.6; }
  100% { top: 100%; opacity:0; }
}
@keyframes blink {
  0%,100% { opacity:1; }
  50%      { opacity:0; }
}
@keyframes bounceDown {
  0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50%      { transform: translateY(7px); }
}
@keyframes bannerPulse {
  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(254,176,106,0.0), 0 8px 40px rgba(254,176,106,0.25); }
  50%      { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(254,176,106,0.12), 0 8px 40px rgba(254,176,106,0.45); }
}

* { box-sizing: border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }
input, textarea, button { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }
input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); }
input:focus, textarea:focus { outline:none; border-color: rgba(81,173,229,0.55) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(81,173,229,0.12); }
textarea { resize: vertical; }

.field-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 1.2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(81,173,229,0.85);
  margin-bottom: 7px;
}
.field-input {
  width: 100%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.055);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.93);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.11);
  border-radius: 13px;
  font-size: 14.5px;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.field-input[disabled] { opacity:0.55; cursor:not-allowed; }

.radio-chip {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 13px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  user-select: none;
}
.radio-chip:hover { border-color: rgba(254,176,106,0.3) !important; }

.submit-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FEB06A 0%, #f97316 40%, #51ADE5 100%);
  color: #0B1020;
  transition: transform 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s, opacity 0.18s;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(254,176,106,0.35);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.submit-btn::after {
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.18) 50%, transparent 100%);
  background-size:400px 100%;
  animation: shimmer 2.8s infinite;
}
.submit-btn:hover:not([disabled]) { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 36px rgba(254,176,106,0.45); }
.submit-btn:active:not([disabled]) { transform: translateY(0); }
.submit-btn[disabled] { opacity:0.65; cursor:not-allowed; }

.verdict-badge {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 42px;
  letter-spacing: -1px;
  line-height: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4ade80, #22c55e);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  animation: scoreCount 0.6s 0.3s both;
}

.score-num {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 52px;
  letter-spacing: -2px;
  line-height: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FEB06A, #51ADE5);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  animation: scoreCount 0.6s 0.4s both;
}

.progress-bar-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4ade80, #51ADE5);
  border-radius: 4px;
  animation: barFill 1.2s 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
}

.pain-stat {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 14px 10px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  flex: 1;
}
.pain-stat-num {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -1px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FEB06A, #51ADE5);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}
.pain-stat-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  line-height: 1.3;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.get-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 11px 14px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  animation: fadeUp 0.4s both;
}
.get-icon {
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
  .two-col { flex-direction: column !important; }
  .left-panel { display: none !important; }
  .grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
}
`

                ))}

        </div>
    )
}

// ─── MAIN COMPONENT ─────────────────────────────────────
function JobFitIntakeModal() {
    const [stage, setStage] = React.useState<Stage>("form")
    const [error, setError] = React.useState<string | null>(null)
    const [name, setName] = React.useState("")
    const [email, setEmail] = React.useState("")
    const [jobType, setJobType] = React.useState<
        "internship" | "full_time" | ""
    >("")
    const [resumeText, setResumeText] = React.useState("")
    const [resumeUploading, setResumeUploading] = React.useState(false)
    const [targetRoles, setTargetRoles] = React.useState("")
    const [locations, setLocations] = React.useState("")
    const [timeline, setTimeline] = React.useState("")

    React.useEffect(() => {
        if (typeof window === "undefined") return
        const unlocked = localStorage.getItem(TRIAL_UNLOCK_KEY) === "true"
        if (!unlocked) return
        if (isFramerPreview()) {
            setStage("success")
            return
        }
        goToJobFitRun()
    }, [])

    function unlockNow(unlockEmail: string) {
        if (typeof window === "undefined") return
        const e = safeTrimLower(unlockEmail)
        localStorage.setItem(TRIAL_UNLOCK_KEY, "true")
        sessionStorage.setItem(TRIAL_EMAIL_KEY, e)
        localStorage.setItem(TRIAL_EMAIL_KEY, e)
        window.dispatchEvent(new Event("jobfit_unlocked"))
    }

    async function handleResumeUpload() {
        const fileInput = document.createElement("input")
        fileInput.type = "file"
        fileInput.accept = ".pdf,.docx,.doc,.txt"
        fileInput.onchange = async () => {
            const file = fileInput.files?.[0]
            if (!file) return
            setResumeUploading(true)
            try {
                const formData = new FormData()
                formData.append("file", file)
                const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/resume-upload`, {
                    method: "POST",
                    body: formData,
                })
                const data = await res.json()
                if (!res.ok)
                    throw new Error(data?.error || "Upload failed")
                setResumeText(data.text)
            } catch (err: any) {
                setError(
                    err?.message ||
                        "Upload failed. Try pasting your resume instead."
                )
            } finally {
                setResumeUploading(false)
            }
        }
        fileInput.click()
    }

    async function handleSubmit() {
        setError(null)
        const n = (name || "").trim()
        const e = safeTrimLower(email)
        if (!n) {
            setError("Please enter your name.")
            return
        }
        if (!e) {
            setError("Please enter your email.")
            return
        }
        if (!jobType) {
            setError("Select internship or full-time.")
            return
        }
        if (!resumeText.trim()) {
            setError(
                "Paste your résumé — it's how SIGNAL knows which jobs are actually worth your time."
            )
            return
        }
        setStage("saving")
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/jobfit-intake`, {
                method: "POST",
                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    name: n,
                    email: e,
                    job_type: jobType,
                    resume_text: resumeText,
                    target_roles: targetRoles,
                    target_locations: locations,
                    timeline,
                }),
            })
            const raw = await res.text()
            if (!res.ok) {
                try {
                    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw)
                    throw new Error(
                        parsed?.error ||
                            parsed?.detail ||
                            raw ||
                            "Submission failed."
                    )
                } catch {
                    throw new Error(raw || "Submission failed.")
                }
            }
            unlockNow(e)
            setStage("success")
        } catch (err: any) {
            setStage("form")
            setError(err?.message || "Unexpected error. Please try again.")
        }
    }

    function handleResetForTesting() {
        if (typeof window === "undefined") return
        try {
            localStorage.removeItem(TRIAL_UNLOCK_KEY)
            localStorage.removeItem(TRIAL_EMAIL_KEY)
            sessionStorage.removeItem(TRIAL_EMAIL_KEY)
        } catch {}
        setError(null)
        setStage("form")
        setName("")
        setEmail("")
        setJobType("")
        setResumeText("")
        setTargetRoles("")
        setLocations("")
        setTimeline("")
    }

    const isSaving = stage === "saving"
    const preview = typeof window !== "undefined" && isFramerPreview()

    return (
        <>
            <style>{GLOBAL_STYLES}</style>

            {/* ── ROOT ──
                width: 100vw so the component always fills the browser
                window. minHeight 100dvh so mobile Safari toolbar collapse
                doesn't cut off content. overflowX hidden preserves the
                original "no horizontal scroll from decorative orbs" intent
                while letting vertical content scroll naturally. */}
            <div
                style={{
                    width: "100vw",
                    minHeight: "100dvh",
                    background: C.bg,
                    fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
                    position: "relative",
                    overflowX: "hidden",
                    boxSizing: "border-box",
                }}
            >
                {/* ── AMBIENT ORBS ── */}
                <div
                    style={{
                        position: "fixed",
                        inset: 0,
                        pointerEvents: "none",
                        zIndex: 0,
                        overflow: "hidden",
                    }}
                >
                    <div
                        style={{
                            position: "absolute",
                            top: "-10%",
                            left: "-5%",
                            width: 600,
                            height: 600,
                            borderRadius: "50%",
                            background:
                                "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(254,176,106,0.13) 0%, transparent 70%)",
                            animation: "orb1 14s ease-in-out infinite",
                        }}
                    />
                    <div
                        style={{
                            position: "absolute",
                            bottom: "-15%",
                            right: "-8%",
                            width: 700,
                            height: 700,
                            borderRadius: "50%",
                            background:
                                "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(81,173,229,0.11) 0%, transparent 70%)",
                            animation: "orb2 18s ease-in-out infinite",
                        }}
                    />
                    <div
                        style={{
                            position: "absolute",
                            top: "40%",
                            left: "55%",
                            width: 400,
                            height: 400,
                            borderRadius: "50%",
                            background:
                                "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(33,140,140,0.09) 0%, transparent 70%)",
                            animation: "orb3 22s ease-in-out infinite",
                        }}
                    />
                </div>

                {/* ── CONTENT ── */}
                <div style={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 1 }}>
                    {/* ── NAV STRIP ── */}
                    <div
                        style={{
                            padding: "12px 32px",
                            borderBottom: `1px solid ${C.borderSoft}`,
                            display: "flex",
                            alignItems: "center",
                            justifyContent: "space-between",
                        }}
                    >
                        {/* SIGNAL logo — pure SVG, no background ever */}
                        <svg
                            width="240"
                            height="58"
                            viewBox="0 0 240 58"
                            fill="none"
                            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                        >
                            <defs>
                                <linearGradient
                                    id="lgText"
                                    x1="0"
                                    y1="0"
                                    x2="0"
                                    y2="1"
                                >
                                    <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#ffffff" />
                                    <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#8fb8d8" />
                                </linearGradient>
                                <linearGradient
                                    id="lgOrange"
                                    x1="0"
                                    y1="0"
                                    x2="1"
                                    y2="0"
                                >
                                    <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#FEB06A" />
                                    <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#f97316" />
                                </linearGradient>
                                <linearGradient
                                    id="lgBlue"
                                    x1="0"
                                    y1="0"
                                    x2="1"
                                    y2="0"
                                >
                                    <stop
                                        offset="0%"
                                        stopColor="#51ADE5"
                                        stopOpacity="0.8"
                                    />
                                    <stop
                                        offset="100%"
                                        stopColor="#51ADE5"
                                        stopOpacity="0.05"
                                    />
                                </linearGradient>
                            </defs>

                            {/* SIGNAL wordmark */}
                            <text
                                x="2"
                                y="36"
                                fontFamily="'Inter', sans-serif"
                                fontSize="40"
                                fontWeight="900"
                                fontStyle="italic"
                                letterSpacing="-0.5"
                                fill="url(#lgText)"
                            >
                                SIGNAL
                            </text>

                            {/* Orange dash */}
                            <rect
                                x="172"
                                y="17"
                                width="22"
                                height="7"
                                rx="2"
                                fill="url(#lgOrange)"
                            />

                            {/* Divider line */}
                            <line
                                x1="0"
                                y1="43"
                                x2="210"
                                y2="43"
                                stroke="url(#lgBlue)"
                                strokeWidth="1"
                            />

                            {/* by WORKFORCE READY NOW */}
                            <text
                                x="0"
                                y="56"
                                fontFamily="'Inter', sans-serif"
                                fontSize="9"
                                fontWeight="500"
                                fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)"
                                letterSpacing="0.3"
                            >
                                by
                            </text>
                            <text
                                x="14"
                                y="56"
                                fontFamily="'Inter', sans-serif"
                                fontSize="10"
                                fontWeight="800"
                                fill="#FEB06A"
                                letterSpacing="0.9"
                            >
                                WORKFORCE
                            </text>
                            <text
                                x="105"
                                y="56"
                                fontFamily="'Inter', sans-serif"
                                fontSize="10"
                                fontWeight="800"
                                fill="#51ADE5"
                                letterSpacing="0.9"
                            >
                                READY NOW

                                    height: 8,
                                    borderRadius: "50%",

                                    display: "inline-block",

                                    animation: "pulse 2s infinite",
                                }}
                            />
                            3 free checks · No credit card
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* ── MAIN BODY ── */}
                    <div
                        style={{
                            maxWidth: 1380,
                            margin: "0 auto",
                            padding: "40px 32px 60px",

                    >
                        {/* ── HERO HEADLINE ── */}
                        <div
                            style={{
                                textAlign: "center",
                                marginBottom: 44,
                                animation: "fadeUp 0.5s both",
                            }}
                        >
                            <div
                                style={{
                                    display: "inline-flex",
                                    alignItems: "center",
                                    gap: 8,
                                    padding: "6px 16px",
                                    borderRadius: 999,
                                    background: "rgba(254,176,106,0.10)",
                                    border: `1px solid rgba(254,176,106,0.25)`,
                                    fontSize: 11,
                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                    letterSpacing: 1.2,
                                    textTransform: "uppercase",
                                    color: C.orange,
                                    marginBottom: 20,
                                }}
                            >
                                ⚡ Free Job Fit Check
                            </div>
                            <h1
                                style={{
                                    fontFamily: "'Inter', sans-serif",
                                    fontSize: "clamp(32px, 4.5vw, 58px)",
                                    fontWeight: 900,
                                    lineHeight: 1.08,
                                    letterSpacing: "-1.5px",
                                    color: C.text,
                                    marginBottom: 16,
                                }}
                            >
                                Stop Applying to Jobs
                                <br />
                                <span
                                    style={{
                                        background:
                                            "linear-gradient(135deg, #FEB06A 20%, #f97316 50%, #51ADE5 90%)",
                                        WebkitBackgroundClip: "text",
                                        WebkitTextFillColor: "transparent",
                                        backgroundClip: "text",
                                    }}
                                >
                                    You're Not Going to Get
                                </span>
                            </h1>
                            <p
                                style={{
                                    fontSize: "clamp(15px, 1.8vw, 18px)",
                                    color: C.muted,
                                    lineHeight: 1.7,
                                    maxWidth: 560,
                                    margin: "0 auto 28px",
                                }}
                            >
                                SIGNAL reads your background and tells you{" "}
                                <em>exactly</em> whether a role is worth
                                pursuing — before you spend 3 hours on an
                                application going nowhere.
                            </p>

                            {/* Pain stats */}
                            <div
                                style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    gap: 10,
                                    justifyContent: "center",
                                    maxWidth: 560,
                                    margin: "0 auto",
                                    flexWrap: "wrap",
                                }}
                            >
                                {[
                                    {
                                        num: "73%",
                                        label: "of applications never get a response",
                                    },
                                    {
                                        num: "4 hrs",
                                        label: "average time wasted per bad application",
                                    },
                                    {
                                        num: "1 in 8",
                                        label: "students misread job fit entirely",
                                    },
                                ].map((s, i) => (
                                    <div
                                        key={i}
                                        className="pain-stat"
                                        style={{
                                            animationDelay: `${i * 0.1}s`,
                                            animation: "fadeUp 0.5s both",
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        <span className="pain-stat-num">
                                            {s.num}
                                        </span>
                                        <span className="pain-stat-label">
                                            {s.label}
                                        </span>
                                    </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* ── NEXT STEP BANNER ── */}
                        <div
                            style={{
                                margin: "0 0 36px",
                                borderRadius: 20,
                                background:
                                    "linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(254,176,106,0.18) 0%, rgba(249,115,22,0.14) 50%, rgba(81,173,229,0.12) 100%)",
                                border: "1.5px solid rgba(254,176,106,0.45)",
                                padding: "22px 32px",
                                display: "flex",
                                alignItems: "center",
                                justifyContent: "space-between",
                                gap: 24,
                                animation:
                                    "fadeUp 0.5s 0.25s both, bannerPulse 3s 1s ease-in-out infinite",
                                flexWrap: "wrap" as const,
                            }}
                        >
                            <div
                                style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "center",
                                    gap: 18,
                                }}
                            >
                                <div
                                    style={{
                                        width: 48,
                                        height: 48,
                                        borderRadius: 14,
                                        flexShrink: 0,
                                        background:
                                            "linear-gradient(135deg, #FEB06A, #f97316)",
                                        display: "flex",
                                        alignItems: "center",
                                        justifyContent: "center",
                                        fontSize: 22,
                                        fontWeight: 900,
                                        boxShadow:
                                            "0 4px 18px rgba(254,176,106,0.45)",
                                    }}
                                >
                                    1
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            fontFamily: "'Inter', sans-serif",
                                            fontSize: 20,
                                            fontWeight: 900,
                                            letterSpacing: -0.5,
                                            color: "#FFFFFF",
                                            marginBottom: 3,
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        Your next step: build your profile
                                    </div>
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            fontSize: 14,
                                            color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.65)",
                                            lineHeight: 1.4,
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        Paste your résumé below — it takes 60
                                        seconds and unlocks your first 3 Job Fit
                                        checks free
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div
                                style={{
                                    display: "flex",
                                    alignItems: "center",
                                    gap: 10,
                                    color: C.orange,
                                    fontWeight: 800,
                                    fontSize: 15,
                                    flexShrink: 0,
                                }}
                            >
                                <span>
                                    Scroll down &amp; build your profile
                                </span>
                                <span
                                    style={{
                                        fontSize: 22,
                                        animation:
                                            "bounceDown 1.1s ease-in-out infinite",
                                    }}
                                >
                                    ↓
                                </span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* ── TWO COLUMN ── */}
                        <div
                            className="two-col"
                            style={{
                                display: "flex",
                                gap: 40,
                                alignItems: "flex-start",
                            }}
                        >
                            {/* LEFT: Preview */}
                            <div
                                className="left-panel"
                                style={{ width: 340, flexShrink: 0 }}
                            >
                                <div
                                    style={{
                                        position: "sticky",
                                        top: 24,
                                        animation: "fadeUp 0.5s 0.15s both",
                                    }}
                                >
                                    {/* What you get */}
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            background: C.card,
                                            border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                            borderRadius: 20,
                                            padding: "20px 18px",
                                            marginBottom: 16,
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 10,
                                                fontWeight: 700,
                                                letterSpacing: 1.5,
                                                textTransform: "uppercase",
                                                color: C.dim,
                                                marginBottom: 14,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            What Job Fit gives you
                                        </div>
                                        {[
                                            {
                                                icon: "🎯",
                                                label: "Go / No-Go verdict",
                                                desc: "Priority Apply, Apply, Review, or Pass",
                                                color: "rgba(74,222,128,0.15)",
                                            },
                                            {
                                                icon: "📊",
                                                label: "Competitive Fit Score",
                                                desc: "0–100 score against actual hiring criteria",
                                                color: "rgba(81,173,229,0.15)",
                                            },
                                            {
                                                icon: "⚠️",
                                                label: "Where You're Exposed",
                                                desc: "Exact gaps and how to address them",
                                                color: "rgba(254,176,106,0.15)",
                                            },
                                            {
                                                icon: "💡",
                                                label: "Why You're Competitive",
                                                desc: "The strengths that make you stand out",
                                                color: "rgba(74,222,128,0.15)",
                                            },
                                        ].map((item, i) => (
                                            <div
                                                key={i}
                                                className="get-item"
                                                style={{
                                                    animationDelay: `${0.2 + i * 0.08}s`,
                                                    marginBottom: 8,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                <div
                                                    className="get-icon"
                                                    style={{
                                                        background: item.color,
                                                    }}
                                                >
                                                    <span>{item.icon}</span>
                                                </div>
                                                <div>
                                                    <div
                                                        style={{
                                                            fontSize: 13,
                                                            fontWeight: 700,
                                                            color: C.text,
                                                            marginBottom: 2,
                                                        }}
                                                    >
                                                        {item.label}
                                                    </div>
                                                    <div
                                                        style={{
                                                            fontSize: 11,
                                                            color: C.muted,
                                                            lineHeight: 1.4,
                                                        }}
                                                    >
                                                        {item.desc}
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        ))}
                                    </div>

                                    {/* Live preview */}
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            fontSize: 10,
                                            fontWeight: 700,
                                            letterSpacing: 1.5,
                                            textTransform: "uppercase",
                                            color: C.dim,
                                            marginBottom: 10,
                                            paddingLeft: 4,
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        Sample output
                                    </div>
                                    <SampleResultCard />

                                    {/* Credential */}
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            marginTop: 16,
                                            padding: "14px 16px",
                                            borderRadius: 14,
                                            background:
                                                "rgba(254,176,106,0.06)",
                                            border: `1px solid rgba(254,176,106,0.18)`,
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 11,
                                                color: C.muted,
                                                lineHeight: 1.6,
                                                fontStyle: "italic",
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            "I built SIGNAL after 30 years on
                                            the hiring side. I've passed on
                                            thousands of candidates who applied
                                            to the wrong jobs. This tool tells
                                            you what I wish every student knew
                                            before they applied."
                                        </div>
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                marginTop: 8,
                                                fontSize: 11,
                                                fontWeight: 700,
                                                color: C.orange,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            — Peri Ginsberg, Founder
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            {/* RIGHT: Form */}
                            <div
                                style={{
                                    flex: 1,
                                    minWidth: 0,
                                    animation: "fadeUp 0.5s 0.1s both",
                                }}
                            >
                                {stage === "form" || stage === "saving" ? (
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            background: C.card,
                                            border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                            borderRadius: 22,
                                            padding: "32px 30px",
                                            boxShadow:
                                                "0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)",
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        {/* Form header */}
                                        <div style={{ marginBottom: 26 }}>
                                            <h2
                                                style={{
                                                    fontFamily:
                                                        "'Inter', sans-serif",
                                                    fontSize: 24,
                                                    fontWeight: 900,
                                                    letterSpacing: -0.5,
                                                    color: C.text,
                                                    marginBottom: 6,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                Build Your Profile
                                            </h2>
                                            <p
                                                style={{
                                                    fontSize: 14,
                                                    color: C.muted,
                                                    lineHeight: 1.5,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                Takes 2 minutes. Your résumé is
                                                how SIGNAL learns which jobs are
                                                actually worth your energy.
                                            </p>
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Section: You */}
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 10,
                                                fontWeight: 700,
                                                letterSpacing: 1.5,
                                                textTransform: "uppercase",
                                                color: C.dim,
                                                marginBottom: 14,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            About You
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Name + Email */}
                                        <div
                                            className="grid-2"
                                            style={{
                                                display: "grid",
                                                gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr",
                                                gap: 14,
                                                marginBottom: 16,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="field-label">
                                                    Name
                                                </label>
                                                <input
                                                    className="field-input"
                                                    style={{
                                                        height: 48,
                                                        padding: "0 16px",
                                                    }}
                                                    value={name}
                                                    onChange={(e) =>
                                                        setName(e.target.value)
                                                    }
                                                    placeholder="Full name"
                                                    disabled={isSaving}
                                                />
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="field-label">
                                                    Email
                                                </label>
                                                <input
                                                    className="field-input"
                                                    style={{
                                                        height: 48,
                                                        padding: "0 16px",
                                                    }}
                                                    value={email}
                                                    onChange={(e) =>
                                                        setEmail(e.target.value)
                                                    }
                                                    placeholder="you@university.edu"
                                                    autoComplete="email"
                                                    inputMode="email"
                                                    disabled={isSaving}
                                                />
                                            </div>
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Job type */}
                                        <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
                                            <label className="field-label">
                                                I'm looking for
                                            </label>
                                            <div
                                                style={{
                                                    display: "flex",
                                                    gap: 10,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                {(
                                                    [
                                                        "internship",
                                                        "full_time",
                                                    ] as const
                                                ).map((jt) => (
                                                    <label
                                                        key={jt}
                                                        className="radio-chip"
                                                        style={{
                                                            border:
                                                                jobType === jt
                                                                    ? `1.5px solid rgba(254,176,106,0.55)`
                                                                    : `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                                            background:
                                                                jobType === jt
                                                                    ? "rgba(254,176,106,0.08)"
                                                                    : C.glass,
                                                            color:
                                                                jobType === jt
                                                                    ? C.text
                                                                    : C.muted,
                                                        }}
                                                    >
                                                        <input
                                                            type="radio"
                                                            name="jobType"
                                                            value={jt}
                                                            checked={
                                                                jobType === jt
                                                            }
                                                            onChange={() =>
                                                                setJobType(jt)
                                                            }
                                                            style={{
                                                                display: "none",
                                                            }}
                                                        />
                                                        <span
                                                            style={{
                                                                width: 16,
                                                                height: 16,
                                                                borderRadius:
                                                                    "50%",
                                                                flexShrink: 0,
                                                                transition:
                                                                    "all 0.2s",
                                                                border:
                                                                    jobType ===
                                                                    jt
                                                                        ? `2px solid ${C.orange}`
                                                                        : `2px solid ${C.border}`,
                                                                background:
                                                                    jobType ===
                                                                    jt
                                                                        ? C.orange
                                                                        : "transparent",
                                                                boxShadow:
                                                                    jobType ===
                                                                    jt
                                                                        ? `0 0 8px rgba(254,176,106,0.5)`
                                                                        : "none",
                                                            }}
                                                        />
                                                        {jt === "internship"
                                                            ? "🎓 Internship"
                                                            : "💼 Full-time"}
                                                    </label>
                                                ))}
                                            </div>
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Divider */}
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                height: 1,
                                                background: C.borderSoft,
                                                marginBottom: 22,
                                            }}
                                        />

                                        {/* Section: Your Background */}
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 10,
                                                fontWeight: 700,
                                                letterSpacing: 1.5,
                                                textTransform: "uppercase",
                                                color: C.dim,
                                                marginBottom: 6,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            Your Background
                                        </div>
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 13,
                                                color: C.muted,
                                                marginBottom: 14,
                                                lineHeight: 1.5,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            This is the core of Job Fit. SIGNAL
                                            reads your experience and maps it
                                            against what the role actually
                                            requires.
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Resume */}
                                        <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
                                            <label className="field-label">
                                                Résumé{" "}
                                                <span
                                                    style={{ color: C.orange }}
                                                >
                                                    *
                                                </span>
                                            </label>
                                            <button
                                                type="button"
                                                onClick={handleResumeUpload}
                                                disabled={resumeUploading || isSaving}
                                                style={{
                                                    width: "100%",
                                                    padding: "12px 18px",
                                                    borderRadius: 12,
                                                    background: "rgba(81,173,229,0.08)",
                                                    border: "1px solid rgba(81,173,229,0.30)",
                                                    color: "#51ADE5",
                                                    fontWeight: 900,
                                                    fontSize: 13,
                                                    cursor: resumeUploading ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
                                                    opacity: resumeUploading ? 0.5 : 1,
                                                    marginBottom: 8,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                {resumeUploading
                                                    ? "Uploading..."
                                                    : "Upload Resume (PDF, DOCX, TXT)"}
                                            </button>
                                            <div
                                                style={{
                                                    fontSize: 11,
                                                    color: C.dim,
                                                    textAlign: "center",
                                                    marginBottom: 8,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                or paste manually
                                            </div>
                                            <div
                                                style={{
                                                    padding: "8px 14px 6px",
                                                    background:
                                                        "rgba(81,173,229,0.06)",
                                                    border: `1px solid rgba(81,173,229,0.2)`,
                                                    borderRadius:
                                                        "12px 12px 0 0",
                                                    fontSize: 11,
                                                    color: C.blue,
                                                    fontWeight: 600,
                                                    borderBottom: "none",
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                💡 Tip: Copy and paste
                                                everything — formatting doesn't
                                                matter
                                            </div>
                                            <textarea
                                                className="field-input"
                                                style={{
                                                    padding: "14px 16px",
                                                    borderRadius:
                                                        "0 0 13px 13px",
                                                    lineHeight: "1.55",
                                                    fontSize: 13.5,
                                                    borderTop: "none",
                                                    display: "block",
                                                }}
                                                value={resumeText}
                                                onChange={(e) =>
                                                    setResumeText(
                                                        e.target.value
                                                    )
                                                }
                                                placeholder={
                                                    "Education, experience, skills, projects — paste it all here.\n\nExample:\nBSBA Marketing, University of Florida, GPA 3.7\nMarketing Intern, Nike — built dashboards in Tableau, drove 23% engagement lift\nSkills: Excel, Google Analytics, SQL basics..."
                                                }
                                                disabled={isSaving}
                                                rows={9}
                                            />
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Divider */}
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                height: 1,
                                                background: C.borderSoft,
                                                marginBottom: 20,
                                            }}
                                        />

                                        {/* Optional extras */}
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 10,
                                                fontWeight: 700,
                                                letterSpacing: 1.5,
                                                textTransform: "uppercase",
                                                color: C.dim,
                                                marginBottom: 14,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            Optional — sharpen your results
                                        </div>

                                        <div style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
                                            <label className="field-label">
                                                Target Roles
                                            </label>
                                            <input
                                                className="field-input"
                                                style={{
                                                    height: 46,
                                                    padding: "0 14px",
                                                }}
                                                value={targetRoles}
                                                onChange={(e) =>
                                                    setTargetRoles(
                                                        e.target.value
                                                    )
                                                }
                                                placeholder="Marketing Analyst, Finance…"
                                                disabled={isSaving}
                                            />
                                        </div>
                                        <div style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
                                            <label className="field-label">
                                                Preferred Locations
                                            </label>
                                            <input
                                                className="field-input"
                                                style={{
                                                    height: 46,
                                                    padding: "0 14px",
                                                }}
                                                value={locations}
                                                onChange={(e) =>
                                                    setLocations(e.target.value)
                                                }
                                                placeholder="NYC, Remote, Chicago…"
                                                disabled={isSaving}
                                            />
                                        </div>
                                        <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
                                            <label className="field-label">
                                                Timeline
                                            </label>
                                            <input
                                                className="field-input"
                                                style={{
                                                    height: 46,
                                                    padding: "0 14px",
                                                }}
                                                value={timeline}
                                                onChange={(e) =>
                                                    setTimeline(e.target.value)
                                                }
                                                placeholder="Now / Summer 2025 / Flexible"
                                                disabled={isSaving}
                                            />
                                        </div>

                                        {/* Error */}
                                        {error && (
                                            <div
                                                style={{
                                                    marginBottom: 16,
                                                    padding: "11px 15px",
                                                    borderRadius: 12,
                                                    background:
                                                        "rgba(248,113,113,0.08)",
                                                    border: `1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.28)`,
                                                    color: C.red,
                                                    fontSize: 13,
                                                    fontWeight: 700,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                {error}
                                            </div>
                                        )}

                                        {/* CTA */}
                                        <button
                                            className="submit-btn"
                                            onClick={handleSubmit}
                                            disabled={isSaving}
                                        >
                                            {isSaving
                                                ? "Building your profile…"
                                                : "Get My Free Job Fit Analysis →"}
                                        </button>

                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                marginTop: 12,
                                                textAlign: "center",
                                                fontSize: 12,
                                                color: C.dim,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            3 free Job Fit checks · No credit
                                            card · Results in seconds
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ) : null}

                                {/* ── SUCCESS ── */}
                                {stage === "success" && (
                                    <div
                                        style={{
                                            background: C.card,
                                            border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                            borderRadius: 22,
                                            padding: "48px 32px",
                                            boxShadow:
                                                "0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)",
                                            textAlign: "center",
                                            animation: "fadeUp 0.4s both",
                                        }}
                                    >
                                        <div
                                            style={{
                                                width: 72,
                                                height: 72,
                                                borderRadius: "50%",
                                                background: C.greenGlow,
                                                border: `2px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.4)`,
                                                display: "flex",
                                                alignItems: "center",
                                                justifyContent: "center",
                                                margin: "0 auto 24px",
                                                boxShadow: `0 0 30px rgba(74,222,128,0.2)`,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            <span
                                                style={{
                                                    fontSize: 32,
                                                    color: C.green,
                                                    fontWeight: 900,
                                                }}
                                            >
                                                ✓
                                            </span>
                                        </div>
                                        <h2
                                            style={{
                                                fontFamily:
                                                    "'Inter', sans-serif",
                                                fontSize: 36,
                                                fontWeight: 900,
                                                letterSpacing: -1,
                                                color: C.text,
                                                marginBottom: 10,
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            You're in.
                                        </h2>
                                        <p
                                            style={{
                                                fontSize: 16,
                                                color: C.muted,
                                                lineHeight: 1.6,
                                                maxWidth: 420,
                                                margin: "0 auto 28px",
                                            }}
                                        >
                                            Your profile is saved. Now paste any
                                            job description and SIGNAL will tell
                                            you exactly where you stand.
                                        </p>
                                        <button
                                            className="submit-btn"
                                            onClick={goToJobFitRun}
                                        >
                                            Start My First Job Fit Check →
                                        </button>
                                        {preview && (
                                            <>
                                                <div
                                                    style={{
                                                        marginTop: 16,
                                                        color: C.dim,
                                                        fontSize: 12,
                                                    }}
                                                >
                                                    Preview: reset below to
                                                    re-test form
                                                </div>
                                                <button
                                                    onClick={
                                                        handleResetForTesting
                                                    }
                                                    style={{
                                                        marginTop: 10,
                                                        width: "100%",
                                                        padding: "12px 16px",
                                                        borderRadius: 14,
                                                        background: C.glass,
                                                        border: `1px solid ${C.border}`,
                                                        cursor: "pointer",
                                                        color: C.text,
                                                        fontWeight: 700,
                                                        fontSize: 13,
                                                        fontFamily: "inherit",
                                                    }}
                                                >
                                                    Reset Trial (Preview Only)
                                                </button>
                                            </>
                                        )}
                                    </div>
                                )}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </>
    )
}

export default JobFitIntakeModal
